{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Perfected Shadow
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Perfected Shadow]] uses brainwashing magic on its agents.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Perfected Shadow]] may have inserted traitors into Shyrax's fleet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“He’s an agent of the Perfected Shadow,” I went on. “All sorts of brainwashing magic on him.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
